verdict.summary: gRPC service or method not found. Service not registered on server, wrong endpoint, or load balancer routing to wrong backend.

dead_ends.action: Use a different gRPC status code to mask the error
dead_ends.why_fails: Masking NOT_FOUND with a different code hides the real routing issue and makes debugging harder.

dead_ends.action: Add a catch-all handler for unknown services
dead_ends.why_fails: A catch-all handler bypasses proper service registration and type safety of gRPC. Fix the routing instead.

workarounds.action: Verify the service is registered on the server and listening
workarounds.how: grpcurl -plaintext localhost:50051 list  # lists all registered services; confirm yours is present

workarounds.action: Check load balancer or service mesh routing configuration
workarounds.how: Verify Envoy/Istio/nginx-grpc routes match the gRPC service name; check upstream health checks

workarounds.action: Ensure the full service name matches: package.ServiceName/MethodName
workarounds.how: The gRPC service path is /package.ServiceName/MethodName — check proto package name matches registration
